title: MEGA Ender Drives
description: Adds MEGA variants of EnderDrives with infinite capacity (type-limited) and frequency linking across dimensions and players
body:
MEGA Ender Drives is an addon to [EnderDrives](https://modrinth.com/mod/enderdrives) which adds Item Storage Cells with infinite capacity (type-limited) and frequency linking across dimensions and players.

This mod expands that and adds more Item Storage Cells with configurable type limits.

Adds cell disassembly to both [EnderDrives](https://modrinth.com/mod/enderdrives) and MEGA Ender Drives

With dynamic crafting recipes to [Advanced AE](https://modrinth.com/mod/advancedae), [Extended AE](https://modrinth.com/mod/extended-ae) and [MEGA Cells](https://modrinth.com/mod/mega) based upon which of these mods are loaded.
